notes: IBM midrange platform; rebranded iSeries (2000), System i (2006), IBM Power Systems (2008). Still active as IBM i on Power.
Latest OS/400 release at time of study; declared Year 2000 safe by IBM. OS/400 eventually became IBM i.
aberdeen-1996-as400-year-2000-ibm-leading-users, Predecessor platforms to AS/400; many applications had Y2K date assumptions inherited from System/3X era.
Date windowing algorithms, 4-digit date expansion, and assessment tools for Y2K compliance.
IBM AS/400 uses fixed 100-year window (1940-2039) to resolve 2-digit year ambiguity; published by IBM for use in new/migrated applications.
Study contrasts AS/400 Y2K approach with mainframe environments; mainframes faced similar Y2K challenges.
VMS cited as one of the operating environments facing Y2K challenges alongside AS/400.
UNIX cited alongside AS/400 as one of the environments needing Y2K remediation.
